## ✅ Design Verification Summary

| Check | Result | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| **DRC (Electrical)** | ✅ **0 Errors** | No shorts, clearance violations, unconnected nets on routed signals |
| **DRC (Warnings)** | 64 warnings | Cosmetic only: dangling stub tracks, silkscreen clips |
| **BGA-2500 Compliance** | ✅ **PASS** | 2500 balls, 0.45 mm pads, 0.8 mm pitch, SMD, mask +0.05 mm |
| **Impedance Control** | ✅ **Implemented** | SerDes (L12): 0.09/0.12 mm @ 100Ω; PCIe (L12): 85Ω; TFLN RF (L5): 0.15 mm @ 50Ω |
| **Plane Pours** | ✅ Complete | GND (L8), PWR_CORE (L13), VDD_IO zones refilled |
| **Netlist Validation** | ✅ PASS | 26 interface nets (10 power + 16 signal pairs), hierarchical schematic |
| **Gerber Integrity** | ✅ Verified | 40 files, positive polarity, metric, absolute coords, RS-274X |
| **Drill Integrity** | ✅ Verified | 8 holes, 3.2 mm NPTH, ISO 11571 (Excellon 2) |
| **Assembly Data** | ✅ Generated | CPL (12 components), BOM (3 unique parts with MPNs/descriptions) |

## ⚠️ Known Gaps Requiring Vendor Action (Pre-Production)

| # | Item | Impact | Action Required |
|---|------|--------|-----------------|
| **1** | **TFLN PIC Footprints (U102/U202)** | High | Engineering reference only — need **actual package drawing from vendor (NTT/iXblue/HyperLight)** for optical keepout, bump pitch, soldermask openings |
| **2** | **16 vs 15 Cu Layer Stackup** | Medium | KiCad requires even layer count (16). Datasheet specifies 15 Cu. **Confirm with fab** if they will: (a) run 16-layer as-is, (b) merge two inner layers, or (c) adjust stackup |
| **3** | **Fab Capability — HDI Type III** | High | **Outside Seeed Fusion standard.** Requires: Rogers RO4350B stock, any-layer microvias (≤0.2 mm), via-fill, back-drill ±0.127 mm, ENIG IPC-4552 Class 3, CVD diamond core option. **Qualify vendors: Sanmina, Flex, TTM, Rogers-certified shops** |
| **4** | **IPC Class 3 / A-600** | High | Required for 400G optics + HBM4. Confirm fab supports Class 3 inspection criteria |
| **5** | **A₁₁ Electrical Test Points** | Medium | Not yet mapped to PCB — need test netlist + probe points for flying probe / ICT |
| **6** | **Thermal Model / TEC Validation** | Medium | Dual NCE @ 500A+ peak requires CVD diamond spreader + liquid cold plate. Validate with fab's thermal simulation |

---

| Week | Milestone | Owner |
|------|-----------|-------|
| **1** | **Send Gerber package to 2–3 qualified HDI fabs** for DFM review & quote. Include: stackup CSV, impedance table, this report. | You |
| **1** | **Request TFLN PIC package drawing** from photonics vendor (NTT/iXblue/HyperLight) | You |
| **1–2** | **Stackup reconciliation** with fab — confirm 15 vs 16 layer approach | Fab + You |
| **2** | **DFM sign-off** — resolve TFLN pad clearance (0.075 mm actual vs 0.2 mm rule) via custom rule waiver | Fab |
| **2–3** | **Final Gerber export** (post-DFM changes) + assembly drawings | You |
| **4** | **Fab order placed** — 4–8 week lead time for 15/16-layer Rogers HDI | You |
| **4–12** | **Fabrication** → **Assembly** → **A₁₁ Test** → **FAI** | Fab/Assembly House |

## 📋 Fabrication Notes for Vendor RFQ

> **Board:** LR-P3A Rev 6.3, Dual-NCE Module Interface  
> **Size:** 230.15 × 150.15 mm (9.06″ × 5.91″)  
> **Thickness:** 1.6 mm ±10%  
> **Layers:** 16 Cu (KiCad) ≈ 15 Cu (design target) — **CONFIRM WITH FAB**  
> **Material:** Rogers RO4350B (RF layers L2/L3/L11/L12) + High-Tg FR-4 (Isola 370HR or equiv)  
> **Technology:** HDI Type III (any-layer microvias ≤0.2 mm), via-fill, back-drill ±0.127 mm  
> **Finish:** ENIG (IPC-4552 Class 3), 2–5 µ" Au over 100–150 µ" Ni  
> **Impedance:** 100Ω diff (SerDes 200G), 85Ω diff (PCIe Gen6), 50Ω SE (TFLN RF) — **controlled on L5, L12**  
> **Min Trace/Space:** 0.075 mm / 0.075 mm (TFLN pads), 0.09 mm / 0.09 mm (SerDes)  
> **Min Via:** 0.15 mm laser microvia (HDI), 0.3 mm mechanical (BGA escape)  
> **Soldermask:** LPI, green, matte; dam 0.05 mm (standard), 0 mm (TFLN — **waiver needed**)  
> **Silkscreen:** White, top only (reference designators, polarity, rev label)  
> **Drill:** 8× NPTH 3.2 mm (M3 bolster), no PTH required  
> **Electrical Test:** Flying probe per A₁₁ test plan (netlist to be provided)  
> **Inspection:** IPC-A-600 Class 3, 100% AOI, X-ray for BGA-2500  
> **Panelization:** Single-up (230×150 mm) or 2-up on 18″×24″ panel — **fab to advise**  
> **Special:** Optical keepout zone (2.54 mm radius around U102/U202) — no copper, no mask, no silk

├── data/
